_comment: Static rotation table for Zapier-based Pinterest auto-pinner. Index = day-of-year % len(pins) (deterministic, no state file needed). Images hosted publicly in this same midwestmade4u-pins repo. MIRRORED HERE (public repo) on 2026-07-03 because the private midwestmade4u-shop copy requires an auth token on every raw.githubusercontent.com fetch, which scheduled tasks cannot supply -- this public copy is the primary source SKILL.md fetches from. Keep in sync with midwestmade4u-shop/tracking/pinterest_zapier_pins.json (editorial source of truth) whenever a pin is added. Bundle pins (021-027) point to a dedicated 'Disney Trip Planning Bundles' board (id 1078612248196086848) as of 2026-07-03. New-products batch (028-033) added 2026-07-05.

_video_comment: video_url (added 2026-07-03) is a relative path in THIS repo (repo_raw_base + video_url = full public mp4 URL) for the Buffer-based video-pin poster. Only 3 sample pins have video_url so far (Phase 1 sample test) -- full rollout pending Matt's review of the sample videos. Buffer posting config: organizationId 6a48235d7add101768ce2235, channelId 6a4823da5ab6d2f106a03198 ('midwestmade4u Pinterest Business'). Buffer's internal board ids (pin_subprofile) differ from Pinterest's native board_id above -- see buffer_board_map for the name-based translation.

buffer_board_map._comment: Maps this file's Pinterest board_id (native Pinterest API id) to Buffer's internal pin_subprofile id, matched by board NAME since the two systems use different ids for the same board.
